$schema.title: Registry Schema URL
$schema.description: The Schema URL, which should be `https://weme-ui.github.io/schema/v2/registry.schema.json`

name.title: Registry Name
name.description: The name of the registry, in the format of `repo/registry`.

url.title: Registry URL
url.description: The URL of the registry, which should point to the registry's `registry.json` file.

prefix.title: Registry Prefix
prefix.description: The prefix of the components from this registry.

name.title: Registry Item Name
name.description: The name of the registry item, which should be unique in the registry.

scope.title: Registry Item Scope
scope.description: The scope of the registry item.

dependencies.title: Registry Item Dependencies
dependencies.description: The names of other items that this item depends on.

devDependencies.title: Registry Item Development Dependencies
devDependencies.description: The names of other items that this item depends on during development.

localDependencies.title: Registry Item Local Dependencies
localDependencies.description: The names of other items in the same registry that this item depends on.

type.title: Registry Item File Type
type.description: The type of the registry item file.

path.title: Registry Item File Path
path.description: The path of the registry item file.

target.title: Registry Item File Target
target.description: The target of the registry item file.

hash.title: Registry Item File Hash
hash.description: The hash of the registry item file.

oneOf.title: Registry Item File
oneOf.description: A file in the registry item.

type.title: Registry Item File Type
type.description: The type of the registry item file.

path.title: Registry Item File Path
path.description: The path of the registry item file.

target.title: Registry Item File Target
target.description: The target of the registry item file.

hash.title: Registry Item File Hash
hash.description: The hash of the registry item file.

oneOf.title: Registry Item File
oneOf.description: A file in the registry item.

items.title: Registry Item File
items.description: A file in the registry item.

files.title: Registry Item Files
files.description: The files that belong to this item.

cssVariables.title: Registry Item CSS Variables
cssVariables.description: The CSS variables of the registry item.

title: Weme UI Registry JSON Schema Definitions
description: This schema defines the structure of the registry JSON file used in Weme UI.
